title: Permanent Night Vision
description: Press G to toggle permanent night vision without UI/particles. Compatible with shaders.
body:
When the player presses the G key, grant them a permanent night vision effect that has no particle effects and does not display a UI. Compatible with shaders
在玩家按下G键后，给予玩家永久的夜视效果（该夜视效果没有粒子效果，没有显示UI）。兼容光影
